## New Buy Rating Initiated on Nvidia by Sell-Side Analyst

Incremental sentiment positive; new buy initiations broaden the institutional holder base and can support near-term price action, though no new fundamental thesis is evident from the headline alone.

- A new buy rating was initiated on NVDA per Globe and Mail coverage
- No price target or initiating firm named in the headline
- Adds to the existing constructive sell-side consensus around the AI infrastructure thesis
- Medium classifier confidence — formal rating action but thin headline detail
